title: hieracium bifidum subsp. eurynotum
intro: Hieracium bifidum subsp. eurynotum, also known as Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Hawkweed is often used in teas, tinctures, and salves, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
